tips: • Auto‑send can be enabled in settings
• If you see 'EADDRINUSE' — change the local port
• Double‑check IP and port before sending
• If the connection fails — restart the WireGuard service
• You can test with the local address 127.0.0.1
• Enable 'Activity log' to see more connection details
• Make sure UDP is not blocked by your ISP
• If everything works — save the current settings as a preset
